title: lycopodium diaphanum
intro: Lycopodium diaphanum, also known as club moss, is a species of lycopodium that belongs to the lycopodiopsida class of plants. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly as an expectorant to relieve congestion and coughs. The health benefits of Lycopodium diaphanum include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Lycopodium diaphanum can be prepared into herbal preparations like tinctures, infusions, and capsules to be used in traditional medicine.
